questionHtml:
Which cell component arose first during the formation of the earliest cells?

A. Chloroplast

B. Plasma membrane

C. Mitochondria

D. Cell wall

meta.title: Which cell component arose first during the formation of the earliest cells? A. Chloroplast B. Plasma membrane C. Mitochondria D. Cell wall
